$description: Single pinned record of the runtime CDN assets the skill loads. SRI (sha384) is applied ONLY to the immutable single-file JS bundles (Tailwind browser, axe-core). Pretendard/Google-Fonts are pinned by tag/URL WITHOUT integrity because they are chaining CSS that resolves to rotating font files (SRI on the CSS would not cover the fonts and can break on a CSS refresh). Resolved + hashed 2026-06-24.

pretendard.note: chaining CSS → font files; pinned by tag, no SRI

google-fonts.note: server-versioned chaining CSS; left as-is, no SRI
